measurements.claim: Pass 0017 created a CloudQuantumProviderMetadataParserSet/v1 artifact with status PARSER_PROFILE_MATCH, three parser profiles, eight negative fixtures, seven source anchors, and seal e098df09eb2556049e1b9e676b0ace8f0000d1f0bda7565628e2195711e84b21.
Pass 0017 defines provider metadata parser profiles for Amazon Braket GetDevice, IBM BackendProperties, and Azure Quantum target list/show.
The Braket parser profile requires device ARN, device type, status, capabilities, payload hash, and rejects simulator or unavailable device-capability hardware claims.
evidence: Braket rejection rules include simulator and unavailable capabilities

measurements.claim: The IBM parser profile requires backend name, backend version, last update date, qubits, gates, payload hash, and rejects missing calibration or paired simulator-status evidence for hardware claims.
evidence: IBM rejection rules include missing qubits/gates and paired simulator-status evidence

measurements.claim: The Azure parser profile requires workspace, provider id, target id, target profile, payload hash, and rejects simulator or unverified target-kind hardware claims.
evidence: Azure rejection rules include simulator target and unverified target kind

measurements.claim: Pass 0017 defines QuantumRegisterLayoutReceipt/v1 with a Qiskit-style two-qubit measurement map, explicit leftmost/rightmost string positions, and layout hash 04cd4fff62e90a8888e74243fab8bf249d74c795650649c1a545e375fdde49fe.

measurement_map includes q[1] to c[1] leftmost

measurements.claim: Pass 0017 defines QuantumPostProcessingReceipt/v1 baseline with raw and normalized result hashes required and mitigation, filtering, and truncation set to false.

Pass 0017 negative fixtures reject missing metadata payload hash, unknown target kind as hardware, omitted register layout, absent endian convention, duplicate JSON keys, binary-as-JSON parsing, missing float precision policy, and post-processing without receipt.
Pass 0017 validator reports MATCH with one matched check and zero drift.
Pass 0017 records tool receipts showing Index, Gather, Telos, Forum, and Crucible status MATCH while preserving Forum submit as UNVERIFIABLE due to executor JSON parsing.

tool receipts include gather status MATCH
tool receipts include telos operator_doctor status MATCH
tool receipts include forum status MATCH and verify MATCH
tool receipts include forum_submit status UNVERIFIABLE
tool receipts include crucible status MATCH
Forum submit error recorded: configured executor did not return valid JSON
